title: helianthemum guttatum subsp. discolor
intro: Helianthemum guttatum subsp. discolor, also known as rockrose, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Cistaceae family. Traditionally, rockrose has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, promoting wound healing, and supporting digestive health. Rockrose can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also sometimes used in topical applications, such as creams and ointments, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
